title: Becoming a chatbot: my life as a real estate AI’s human backup – podcast
author: Written by Laura Preston and read by Erin Hunter. Produced by Jessica Beck. The executive producer was Ellie Bury
standfirst: For one weird year, I was the human who stepped in to make sure a property chatbot didn’t blow its cover – I was a person pretending to be a computer pretending to be a person. By Laura Preston
body_text: Read the text version here A longer version of this story appears in the latest n+1 magazine
